languages.text: "Иокаста и ее бойцы уже на месте? Так ли мое вмешательство необходимо?"

traits.locale_text: "Иокаста и ее бойцы уже на месте? Так ли мое вмешательство необходимо?"

languages.text: "Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"
languages.original_text: "Иокаста и ее бойцы уже на месте? Так ли мое вмешательство необходимо?"

traits.locale_text: "Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"
"Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"
"Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"

languages.text: 「ザウアーバックと彼女の戦闘員はすでにそこにいるのか？私の介入は本当に必要なのか？」
languages.original_text: "Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"

languages.text: "Sauerback ve savaşçıları orada mı? Müdahalem gerçekten bu kadar gerekli mi?"
languages.original_text: "Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"

traits.locale_text: "Sauerback ve savaşçıları orada mı? Müdahalem gerçekten bu kadar gerekli mi?"

languages.text: “苏尔贝克和她的战士已经到了？确定要我亲自介入吗？”
languages.original_text: "Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"

traits.locale_text: “苏尔贝克和她的战士已经到了？确定要我亲自介入吗？”

languages.text: "Sauerback und ihre Kämpfer sind schon dort? Ist mein Eingreifen wirklich so wichtig?"
languages.original_text: "Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"

traits.locale_text: "Sauerback und ihre Kämpfer sind schon dort? Ist mein Eingreifen wirklich so wichtig?"

languages.text: « Sauerback et ses hommes sont déjà sur place ? Mon intervention est-elle vraiment indispensable ? »
languages.original_text: "Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"

traits.locale_text: « Sauerback et ses hommes sont déjà sur place ? Mon intervention est-elle vraiment indispensable ? »

languages.text: «¿Dice que Sauerback y sus guerreros ya están allí? ¿Tanta falta hace mi intervención?».
languages.original_text: "Sauerback and her fighters are already there? Is my intervention really that necessary?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Dice que Sauerback y sus guerreros ya están allí? ¿Tanta falta hace mi intervención?».
